ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #123-4567890-1234567 is Shipped
ham.body:
Hello Alex,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon. Your order has been shipped and is on its way to you.

Order Details:
• 1 x Kindle Paperwhite (6th Gen) – $129.99
• 1 x Echo Dot (4th Gen) – $49.99

Shipping Method: Amazon Standard
Estimated Delivery: 3‑5 business days

You can track your shipment at any time by clicking the link below:
<URL>

If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email or contact Amazon Customer Service.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon.com

*This email was sent to alex@example.com. If you did not place this order, please contact us immediately.*

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Crypto Wallet Suspended – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear User,

This is a critical notification from the CoinSecure Wallet Management Team. Due to a series of suspicious transactions detected from your wallet address, we have temporarily suspended all withdrawal and transfer capabilities to protect your assets.

If you do not verify your identity within the next 24 hours, your wallet will be permanently locked and any pending transactions will be canceled. Failure to act may result in the loss of access to your funds.

To reactivate your wallet, please complete the verification process by visiting the link below:
<URL>

The verification process requires a short video call with a CoinSecure representative and submission of a government-issued ID. All personal data will be handled securely in accordance with our privacy policy.

Please note: This action is mandatory. Your wallet will remain suspended until the verification is approved.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
CoinSecure Wallet Security Team
